mapper.select: SELECT dl.log_date AS log_date, SUM(dl.total_calorie) AS totalCalorie, SUM(dl.total_carb) AS totalCarb, SUM(dl.total_protein) AS totalProtein, SUM(dl.total_fat) AS totalFat, SUM( CASE WHEN dl.meal_time IN ('간식','야식') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS lateSnackCount FROM diet_log dl WHERE dl.user_id = #{userId} AND dl.log_date >= #{startDate} AND dl.log_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY dl.log_date ORDER BY dl.log_date

SELECT dl.diet_id, dl.log_date, dl.meal_time, dl.total_calorie AS totalCalorie, IFNULL(SUM(f.sodium), 0) AS totalSodium, IFNULL(SUM(f.sugar), 0) AS totalSugar FROM diet_log dl LEFT JOIN diet_item di ON dl.diet_id = di.diet_id LEFT JOIN food f ON di.food_id = f.food_id WHERE dl.user_id = #{userId} AND dl.log_date >= #{startDate} AND dl.log_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY dl.diet_id, dl.log_date, dl.meal_time, dl.total_calorie ORDER BY dl.log_date, dl.meal_time
SELECT d.disease_name FROM user_disease ud JOIN disease d ON ud.disease_id = d.disease_id WHERE ud.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT dl.log_date AS log_date, SUM(dl.total_calorie) AS totalKcal, SUM(dl.total_carb) AS totalCarb, SUM(dl.total_protein) AS totalProtein, SUM(dl.total_fat) AS totalFat, SUM( CASE WHEN dl.meal_time = '야식' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS nightCount, SUM( CASE WHEN dl.meal_time = '간식' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS snackCount FROM diet_log dl WHERE dl.user_id = #{userId} AND dl.log_date >= #{startDate} AND dl.log_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY dl.log_date ORDER BY dl.log_date
